action_items.title: Redesign certified band visualization (Figure 8)
action_items.description: Current figure is unreadable noise. Redesign with: (a) rolling-average smoothed trajectories, (b) separate subplot showing band width over time, (c) higher resolution. The text claims band narrowing that is invisible in the current figure.

action_items.title: Fix BEM computation for half_lambda
action_items.description: BEM=0.000 for half_lambda (phi=0.5) is mathematically impossible under the stated definition. Audit the BEM computation code, fix the bug, and regenerate Table 6, Figure 5 (heatmap), and Figure 4 (BEM vs accuracy scatter). Update Section 5.4 text accordingly.

action_items.title: Resolve PMP-WD inconsistency between figures and text
action_items.description: PMP-WD appears in Figures 3 and 9 but is never defined in Table 1 or Section 4.1. Either add PMP-WD to all tables and text, or regenerate figures without it. The multi-architecture comparison (Figure 3) must use identical method sets in both panels.

action_items.title: Write appendix proofs for all theoretical claims
action_items.description: Provide complete proofs for: (a) Lyapunov stability certificate, (b) certified band construction, (c) Theorem 2 (cumulative alignment bound). This is the 4th iteration where this has been flagged. Non-negotiable for venue submission.

action_items.title: Fix abstract experimental design description
action_items.description: The abstract implies full factorial (2 optimizers x 2 architectures x 2 datasets) but VGG-16-BN only has SGD/CIFAR-10. Decompose explicitly: '84 ResNet-20 runs + 21 VGG-16-BN runs.'

action_items.title: Run ImageNet experiments (ResNet-50)
action_items.description: Run at minimum: constant, cwd_hard, no_wd on ImageNet with ResNet-50, 3 seeds each (9 runs). Even null results dramatically strengthen the conjecture. Project spec requires this.

action_items.title: Revise Theorem 2 framing to acknowledge non-significance
action_items.description: Change 'moderate negative correlation' to 'non-significant trend (p=0.121).' Demote from 'validates' to 'is suggestive but inconclusive.' Consider whether Theorem 2 should remain a numbered contribution.

action_items.title: Add theory-experiment optimizer mismatch discussion
action_items.description: Add explicit acknowledgment in Section 6.4 or Section 3 that the theoretical analysis uses SGD dynamics while the primary experiments use AdamW. The Phi Invariance Conjecture is empirical, not proven.

action_items.title: Integrate NoBN experiments into paper
action_items.description: NoBN data exists (lessons_learned.md mentions 0.12pp spread). Integrate into Section 5.3 or create Section 5.4 to test the BN hypothesis from Section 6.2 with actual data.

action_items.title: Fix Section 5.7 text to match certified band figure
action_items.description: Either the text or the figure is wrong about band narrowing. If data shows narrowing, fix the figure. If not, revise the text and the 'narrowing explains Phi Invariance' argument.

action_items.title: Strengthen CSI or demote from contribution
action_items.description: CSI does not predict accuracy (rho<0.3). Either find where CSI is predictive (SGD? overfitting regime?), present components separately, or demote to 'exploratory tool.'

action_items.title: Test lambda sensitivity
action_items.description: Run constant vs no_wd at lambda={5e-3, 5e-2} under AdamW to test if Phi Invariance is lambda-dependent. Quick experiment (6 runs).

action_items.title: Report per-layer AIS distributions
action_items.description: The aggregate AIS invariance may mask per-layer heterogeneity. Report AIS per layer to test whether CWD's per-parameter modulation could matter at specific layers even if the average is uninformative.

action_items.title: Increase seed count to 5 for core experiments
action_items.description: Three seeds provide limited power. Five seeds improve power to detect effects >= 0.4% and increase TOST equivalence confirmation rate.

action_items.title: Unify framing: empirical finding primary, framework secondary
action_items.description: Resolve the dual-identity problem. Lead with Phi Invariance finding as primary contribution, framework as methodology. Adjust introduction and contribution list accordingly.
